text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru offers her prayers at Dazaifu
Tenmangu, one of the two most sacred sites in
Fukuoka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then makes a promise with me—we'll visit the
second sacred spot if she manages to get through
the Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More motivated to race than ever,
Matikanefukukitaru heads to the track.
